product_overview: RetractWatch helps researchers detect retracted or problematic science in bibliographies by accepting PDFs or pasted references, extracting citations, performing integrity checks (CrossRef, RetractionWatch, Semantic Scholar cascades) and streaming live results per job.
core_goals: Accept a text-based PDF upload (<= 10MB) or pasted reference lines and extract/parse citations.
Start an integrity scan job and provide a live, shareable results page per jobId with streamed updates.
Surface citation status, integrity scoring, citation cascade visualization, and enable rechecks and report downloads.
Fail fast and surface clear errors for invalid uploads, missing configuration (NEXT_PUBLIC_CONVEX_URL), or upstream API failures.

features.name: PDF bibliography scan
features.description: User uploads a text-based PDF (max 10MB). The app extracts citations from the PDF and starts an integrity scan job, then navigates to a live results page for that job.
user_flows: POST /api/extract with multipart/form-data PDF file under 10MB -> Receive 200 with extracted citations JSON -> POST /api/check with extracted citations JSON -> Receive 200 with jobId -> GET /results/{jobId} -> Receive 200 and page begins streaming results
POST /api/extract with multipart/form-data PDF file over 10MB -> Receive 413/400 error with file size validation message -> Render clear error on home and do not start job
GET / (home) -> Receive 200 with configuration check showing missing NEXT_PUBLIC_CONVEX_URL -> Render explicit configuration error and block starting live scan

features.name: Paste references scan
features.description: User pastes one reference per line into a textarea. The app builds citation stubs from the lines, starts an integrity scan job, and navigates to the results page.
user_flows: POST /api/check with JSON body { references: ["line1","line2",...] } -> Receive 200 with jobId -> GET /results/{jobId} -> Receive 200 and page begins streaming results
POST /api/check with empty or malformed JSON body -> Receive 400 with validation error -> Show inline validation error next to textarea and do not navigate

POST /api/check with valid input but external extraction/LLM step times out -> Receive 502/504 or 202 with delayed processing message -> Show retry/timeout guidance and surface job status if partial jobId returned

features.name: Results dashboard
features.description: A per-job live dashboard that streams citation statuses, integrity scores, and the citation cascade; includes actions such as recheck cascade and report download.
user_flows: GET /results/{jobId} -> Receive 200 with initial job metadata -> Open Convex realtime subscription to NEXT_PUBLIC_CONVEX_URL for jobId -> Receive streaming citation updates and status events

GET /results/{jobId} -> Receive 200 and page loads -> User triggers recheck cascade action -> POST /api/recheck-cascade with { jobId, citationId } -> Receive 200 confirming recheck queued -> Continue receiving updated events via Convex subscription
POST /api/recheck-cascade with { jobId, citationId } while upstream cascade API fails -> Receive 500 or timeout -> Show error notification on results page with retry option

GET /results/{jobId} when NEXT_PUBLIC_CONVEX_URL is missing or Convex dev unavailable -> Receive 200 with page but banner 'Realtime unavailable' -> Results show last-known snapshot and surface instructions about missing configuration

routes.description: Home — upload PDF or paste references to start integrity scan
Live job results, citations, cascade graph, downloads

features.name: PDF bibliography scan
features.description: User uploads a PDF; app extracts citations then starts integrity job
user_interactions: Click or drop zone to choose a PDF under 10MB
Wait for extraction and scan overlay messages
Land on results page with job id in URL

features.name: Paste references scan
features.description: User pastes one reference per line; app builds citation stubs and starts job
user_interactions: Type or paste lines into references textarea
Navigate to results when job starts

features.name: Results dashboard
features.description: View citation feed, scores, cascade, historical comparison, report download
user_interactions: Use recheck or download actions if present

known_limitations.issue: Live scan requires NEXT_PUBLIC_CONVEX_URL and convex dev; otherwise home shows configuration error
known_limitations.impact: E2E may assert error state instead of full pipeline without env

known_limitations.issue: Extract and check call external LLM and APIs; flaky or slow under automation
known_limitations.impact: Tests may need mocks or generous timeouts
